response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive software development experience with a strong technical background, including open-source contributions and leadership in tooling and architecture. While his profile aligns well with technical aspects of the role, his leadership experience is more implicit than explicit, and German proficiency is limited. His diverse project history and mentorship activities suggest potential for the Tech Lead position.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience with modern technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, Python, Linux) and open-source contributions (e.g., GISCollective).
Proven track record in architectural design, tooling, and mentorship (e.g., workshops, code katas, team collaboration).
Strong problem-solving skills and adaptability across domains (web, mobile, embedded, AI infrastructure).
concerns: Limited explicit leadership experience in senior/executive roles (e.g., team management, client advisory, or operational oversight).
German language proficiency is basic (C1 requirement unmet), which may hinder client interactions.
Resume emphasizes individual contributions over strategic leadership or high-level IT consulting experience.
